mission: DreamCo sells trusted AI companies, AI departments, and AI employees that can build, learn, operate, and improve under Buddy's human-trust governance layer.

positioning.promise: Every bot is treated as a supervised digital employee with a job description, tools, memory, dashboards, tests, approvals, and an improvement loop.
positioning.non_negotiable: Autonomy never means bypassing owner consent, billing rules, safety policies, legal review, or deployment approval.

operating_layers.name: Buddy Trust Layer
operating_layers.purpose: Explain work, ask for approval, track risks, and keep humans in control of money, outreach, legal, production, and destructive actions.

operating_layers.name: AI Company Builder
operating_layers.purpose: Turn each bot or division into a sellable business unit with plan, website, offer, workflow, dashboard, metrics, and support loop.

operating_layers.name: AI Employee Runtime
operating_layers.purpose: Give every bot a standard profile, runtime, tool library, API contract, webhook, workflow, skill contract, sandbox, tests, and storage policy.

operating_layers.name: Forever Learning Loop
operating_layers.purpose: Continuously scan resources, compare outcomes, refresh reports, learn from success/failure, and propose pull-request-safe upgrades.

operating_layers.name: Library Builder Factory
operating_layers.purpose: Generate and govern tools, APIs, webhooks, workflows, skills, sandboxes, blueprints, prompts, and dashboards for every bot.

forever_operation_policy.runs_forever: Designed as recurring scans, local-first reports, and scheduled GitHub workflows with cost controls.
forever_operation_policy.learns_forever: Learning loops must record evidence, outcomes, rewards, failures, and next experiments.
forever_operation_policy.builds_forever: Builder systems produce reviewed pull requests, not silent production mutations.
forever_operation_policy.stays_updated: Repository scans, dependency PRs, capability inventory, and GitHub triage keep drift visible.
forever_operation_policy.searches_resources: Public resource discovery is allowed when sourced, rate-limited, and stored as metadata rather than copied code.

sellable_units: AI department for a business function
